    Well-Being Guarantee

    My dog loves her food now and her overall digestive health is getting better and more consistent.

    — Scott F.

    From One Dog Parent to Another

    Founded by Tom for his dog Cooper, Get Joy was built to bring real, gut-healthy nutrition to help every dog live their happiest life.

    Full story →

    Made for dogs of all ages, including puppies, adults, and seniors. Formulated as complete and balanced for all life stages and ideal for pet parents looking to support gut health and overall wellness.

    It includes Belly Biotics, a blend of prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics to help support digestion, stool quality, and immune health. Our freeze drying runs at a lower max temperature, 125°F, and uses a probiotic powered, FDA approved competitive inhibition kill step to help keep food clean while maintaining nutritional integrity. Plus, it delivers 3 billion CFU per lb total probiotics.

    A gradual transition matters, it helps your dog’s digestive system and microbiome adjust smoothly. In about 7 days, many dogs see less digestive upset and more mealtime excitement. By 2 to 3 weeks, you may notice firmer stools and a boost in energy. Around 1 month, shinier coat and healthier skin can follow. At 3 months and beyond, continued gut support can mean more consistent digestion and more joy at mealtime.

    Add to cart

    Fresh Freeze Dried

    ADD TO CART

    Ships in 24 hours • Pause or cancel anytime

    Belly Biotics™: Gut Health Made Simple

    Our unique blend of pre, pro, and postbiotics helps to support a healthy gut, better digestion, and perfect poops.

    How It Works:

    Probiotics are living, beneficial microorganisms that help maintain balance in your dog’s gut. They assist with digestion, help crowd out harmful bacteria, and support immune health.

    Think of prebiotics as fertilizer for your dog’s gut microbiome. Prebiotics are specialized fibers that feed beneficial bacteria, helping them thrive. Without prebiotics, probiotics may pass through the digestive system without fully establishing themselves.

    Postbiotics are the beneficial compounds produced when probiotics break down prebiotics. They support the gut lining, reduce inflammation, and strengthen the immune system.

    Result:

    Less poop, firmer, and better-smelling.

    Because your dog can absorb more of the nutrients in our food, their body produces less waste.

    Belly Biotics™: Gut Health Made Simple

    Our unique formula combines pre-, pro-, and postbiotics to support digestion, comfort, and healthier stools.

    How It Works:

    Live beneficial bacteria that help crowd out harmful microbes, support nutrient absorption, and promote a balanced gut microbiome for better digestion and overall wellness.

    Feed the good bacteria already in your dog’s gut.

    Beneficial compounds produced during the fermentation process that help strengthen the gut lining, reduce inflammation, and support immune function — even after the bacteria are no longer alive.

    Result:

    Happier tummies, healthier stools, and more joyful mealtimes.

    Dog Food for Sensitive Stomachs

    Our vet-formulated, freeze dried meals with Belly Biotics™ are designed to soothe sensitive tummies, support digestion, and promote firmer, healthier stools.

    What Our Pet Parents Are Saying:

    Finally, a food that actually helps her soft stools!

    “Within a week, my dog’s digestion improved and her stools are much firmer. She loves every bite!”

    — Marlen S.

    No more upset tummy after meals

    “We struggled with diarrhea for months. Get Joy’s food stabilized her digestion and made her happier.”

    — Jeff H.

    Even the Pickiest of Pups Love It

    Get Joy's freeze dried, expert-backed meals make mealtime the most joyful part of their day.

    Real Ingredients You Can Trust

    Packed with whole foods and nutrient-rich proteins, Get Joy meals fuel digestion, energy, and overall wellness without the junk.

    85% lean USDA-sourced beef for high-quality protein and essential nutrients.

    85% lean USDA Sourced beef which is rich in high-quality protein and essential nutrients that support energy, muscle growth, and overall well-being.

    Pumpkin is a fiber-rich superfood that supports healthy digestion, helps regulate stool consistency, and naturally nourishes your dog’s gut microbiome. Packed with antioxidants, vitamins A, C, and E, and essential minerals, pumpkin also supports immune health, promotes a shiny coat, and helps dogs feel fuller.

    This oil is a rich source of omega-3 fatty acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties and are important for maintaining healthy skin, coat, and joints in dogs.

    Sorghum gives your dog steady, sustained energy without the blood sugar rollercoaster of corn or wheat. It's gluten-free, easy to digest, and rich in antioxidants.

    Flaxseed is a good source of fiber and lignans (plant compounds with antioxidant properties). It may also help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support heart health.

    Belly Biotics™ is our clinically proven, proprietary blend of prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics designed to support your dog’s gut health from every angle. This powerful trio works together to promote healthy digestion, strengthen the immune system, and reduce inflammation—helping your pup feel their best, inside and out.

    Flaxseed is a good source of fiber and lignans (plant compounds with antioxidant properties). It may also help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support heart health.

    Never in Our Food

    No fillers

    No seed oils

    No artificial preservatives

    How to Feed & Transition Your Dog

    Switching to Get Joy’s Freeze Dried Meals is simple, gentle on the stomach, and ensures your dog gets the full benefits of Belly Biotics™.

    3-Step Transition Guide

    Mix 25% Get Joy with 75% current food.

    Mix 50% Get Joy with 50% current food.

    Mix 25% Get Joy with 75% current food.

    faqs

    Have a Question?

    Yes! Our freeze-dried raw food is packed with high-quality protein and our proprietary Belly Biotics blend of pre-, pro-, and postbiotics. Many pet parents report firmer, healthier stools within the first few days. The natural, minimally processed ingredients are gentle on sensitive stomachs and support optimal digestion.

    Yes! Our freeze-dried meals with Belly Biotics™ are formulated to support digestion, soothe sensitive tummies, and promote healthier stools.

    Absolutely. Our freeze-dried raw recipes are crafted with human-grade ingredients and manufactured in USDA-inspected facilities. The freeze-drying process preserves nutrients while eliminating moisture that bacteria need to thrive. Every batch is tested for safety and quality so you can feel confident about what you're feeding your pup.

    Choose your plan and we'll deliver fresh freeze-dried raw food right to your door on a schedule that works for you. You get 20% off your first box, then 10% off boxes 2 and 3 — plus free treats and access to 24/7 televet support. You can pause, skip, or cancel anytime with no hidden fees.

    After your 90-Day Starter Plan, you'll automatically continue receiving deliveries at our loyal member price with 5% off every order. You'll keep your 24/7 televet access and can still pause, skip, or cancel anytime. No commitments, no hassle — just happy, healthy pups.
